governance.change_rule: Terminology changes require an explicit versioned repository update.
governance.conflict_rule: Repository policy overrides wording inherited from prior chats or superseded documents.

approved_terms.use: The operating system and repository-backed business infrastructure.
The Chief-of-Staff interface and orchestration layer.
The canonical strategic output defined by the Blueprint registry.
The approved post-Blueprint creative platform output.
The executional creative system derived from an approved Campaign World.

unsettled_terms.rule: Do not assign a permanent market-facing product name until it is explicitly approved and versioned here.
Do not invent or revive an engagement label; use descriptive language until an approved name is versioned here.

retired_terms.rationale: The phrase is no longer part of the current Narratiive approach and must not re-enter outputs through chat history.
The phrase has been superseded and is not an approved commercial engagement name.
